hero.professionalExcellenceDesc: Vancouver home renovation company with {experience}+ years of experience, {coverage} CGL insurance, active WCB coverage, and up to 3 years warranty. Kitchen, bathroom and whole house renovations across Metro Vancouver.
hero.realEstateTitle: 一站式服務：裝修+房產+攝影
hero.realEstateDesc: 從完整的家居裝修到房地產經紀人和專業攝影。我們與值得信賴的專業人士合作，一站式提供一切服務。

_translation_meta.note: Per Reno Stars policy §5.2 — first-pass MT to close cross-locale parity gaps. Human review/polish welcome.
